texto: It is certainly better not to have studied a subject at all than to have studied it superficially. For when unaided healthy common sense seeks to form an opinion of something it does not go so far wrong as semi-erudition does.
explicacao: Citação de Lichtenberger sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “It is certainly better not to have studied a subject at all than to have studied it superficially…” articula reflexao, ignorance, studied em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
